===== IMPORT CHAIN DIFFERENCES =====

pet_tracker/main.py imports:
  from detect_escape import detect_escape, polygon_selector
  from detect_fight import detect_fight
  from detect_inert import detect_inert
  from detect_eating import detect_eating
  from tracking import \(save_video, track_with_botsort, track_with_bytetrack, track_with_deepsort\) [NO tracking.py!]
  from reid_tracker import ReIDTracker \(optional\)

PoC/main.py imports:
  from detect_escape2 import detect_escape, polygon_selector
  from detect_fight import detect_fight
  from detect_inert import detect_inert
  from detect_sleep import detect_sleep
  from detect_eat import detect_eat
  from detect_bathroom import detect_bathroom
  from tracking import \(track_with_botsort, track_with_bytetrack, track_with_deepsort\) [YES tracking.py!]
  from reid_tracker import ReIDTracker


===== CODE QUALITY & STRUCTURE =====

pet_tracker observations:
  - Scattered configuration in multiple JSON files
  - Detection modules mixed with main logic
  - Eating detection is basic \(IoU only\)
  - GUI-based polygon selection \(blocking\)
  - No clear abstractions for tracking

PoC observations:
  - Centralized configuration in main.py
  - Clean separation of concerns \(tracking.py, multiple detect_*.py\)
  - Sophisticated behavior detection \(sleep, bathroom with 2-phase\)
  - CLI-based polygon selection \(non-blocking\)
  - Model optimization pipeline for deployment
  - Better error handling and documentation
  - Emoji/visual feedback integration
  - Cleaner multi-stream architecture \(async\)


===== DEPLOYMENT READINESS =====

pet_tracker:
  - Suitable for research/prototyping
  - Multiple experimental features
  - Heavy dependency on config files
  - Real-time streaming partially supported

PoC \(PRODUCTION-READY\):
  - Model optimization for edge deployment
  - Lightning training for advanced ML
  - Mobile export support \(TorchScript, ONNX, CoreML\)
  - Async/concurrent processing
  - Pet profile management
  - Better visualization options
  - Comprehensive CLI interfaces
